hero.title: Liturgical life with clarity, beauty, and pastoral welcome
hero.lede: Sunday Mass, weekday worship, reconciliation, livestream access, and community-specific liturgies as published by the parish.

intro.title: Published parish worship pattern
intro.body: The live parish site currently lists Sunday Parish Mass at 10:00am with livestream, weekday Adoration and Mass on Thursday and Friday, and regular confession on Saturday. Additional seasonal liturgies and special events appear in the parish highlights and diary.
asideItems: Sunday Stations of the Cross at about 12:30pm
Friday Lenten Area House Mass at 7:00pm
Weekly updates published through Highlights of the Week and the bulletin
